howItWorks.intro: This calorie deficit calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Deficit
rules.explanation: Subtract 500 calories per pound you want to lose per week.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much deficit for weight loss?

faq.a: Generally 1200 for women, 1500 for men minimum to meet nutritional needs.
